prompt: Emit IFNET line protocol up log on IPv4 address configuration
note: Added a VRP-style IFNET LINK_STATE log when configuring the first VVRP IPv4 address transitions an Ethernet interface IP line protocol from down to up. Secondary address additions do not repeat the protocol-up log. DS/DATASYNC config-change logs are deferred until VVRP has a dedicated configuration sync/change notification subsystem.

+

Extract per-media FWD adjacency handlers

+

Moved next-hop/direct adjacency selection out of the generic FWD API into a per-media adjacency registry. Ethernet now registers an adjacency handler that resolves gateway routes to FIB next_hop_ip and direct routes to the IPv4 destination; PPP/Tunnel can later register their own handlers without changing the FWD dispatcher.
